name: Threema Web
description: An intuitive and secure web client for Threema users
compose:
name: slashnode-threema
services:
  web:
    image: dennysubke/threema-web:v2.6.4
    container_name: threema
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8855:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
